title: Star Wars: Galactic Starcruiser
summary: The most ambitious immersive experience Disney has ever built.
bullets: Delivered the most complex tech stack in Disney history — 15+ integrated APIs, BLE, Unity, and AI
Built game engine powering 2M+ personalized play permutations across mobile and show control
Led 40+ person cross-functional team from technical inception to live opening
impact: THEA Award · 2 Disney Patents · 100% Guest Satisfaction

title: World of Color: Happiness!
summary: Real-time guest voting that triggers live show moments.
bullets: Guests vote for Pixar emotions via Disneyland app — votes trigger live show moments in real time
Oversaw Flutter mobile dev, BLE location services, and show control integration
Delivered full technical stack from kickoff to opening night in under 6 months
impact: Connected mobile interaction to immersive live storytelling at scale

title: Project 256 / GAIA Engine
summary: Confidential in-park metaverse powered by a proprietary game engine.
bullets: Led technical production for confidential in-park experience built on proprietary GAIA engine
Oversaw Unity, Unreal, AR, BLE MagicBand+, Maya + ShotGrid avatar pipeline integration
Established next-gen platform architecture for Disney's future interactive experiences
impact: Platform foundation for Disney's next generation of interactive park experiences

title: Magic Mobile Platform
summary: The platform powering millions of daily Disney guest interactions.
bullets: Leads 3 sustainment teams supporting BLE radio, Location Services, and Mobile Wallet
Ensures stability and innovation readiness for millions of daily park guest interactions
Operates across Walt Disney World and Disneyland Resort
impact: Millions of daily guest interactions across WDW and Disneyland

title: BLE Accessibility Innovation
summary: Making Disney magic accessible to every guest.
bullets: Real-time closed captioning and audio descriptions via BLE radio network for guests with disabilities
Custom iOS/Android app delivering assistive content tied to physical space and show timing
Actively rolling out internationally — expanding Disney access worldwide
impact: International rollout underway — expanding access for guests with disabilities

title: World of Disney Holiday Windows
summary: The first-ever interactive holiday activation powered by MagicBand+.
bullets: First-ever MagicBand+ retail activation — guests trigger holiday animations via tap at World of Disney
Custom content pipeline + real-time hardware integration driving dynamic festive storytelling
Delivered beloved Disney characters into a seasonal interactive retail experience
impact: First-of-its-kind MagicBand+ retail activation at World of Disney

title: Miss Minutes — Character AI Studio
summary: AI-driven transmedia character experience spanning Disney+ and the parks.
bullets: Built conversational AI system powering Miss Minutes across Disney+ content and in-park touchpoints
Designed transmedia logic allowing the character to maintain continuity between screen and physical world
Pioneered Disney's Character AI Studio platform — foundational work for future AI-driven park characters
impact: Established the foundation for Disney's Character AI Studio platform

title: Buzz Lightyear Space Ranger Spin: Recharge
summary: Complete attraction overhaul bringing Unreal Engine targets and Buddy to Magic Kingdom.
bullets: Led full technical production for the major refurbishment of Buzz Lightyear Space Ranger Spin
New blasters, Unreal Engine-powered interactive targets, and Buddy companion character integration
Attraction reopened April 8, 2026 — delivering a next-gen interactive ride experience at Magic Kingdom
impact: Reopened April 8, 2026 — Unreal Engine-powered next-gen attraction at Magic Kingdom

title: Bigger Bird / Millennium Falcon: Mission 2
summary: The Mandalorian-themed Mission 2 for Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run, powered by Unreal Engine 5.
bullets: Technical production lead for Mission 2 — a full new storyline set in the Mandalorian universe
First major content update to Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run powered by Unreal Engine 5
Launches May 22, 2026 — expanding the interactive ride experience at Disney's Hollywood Studios
impact: Launches May 22, 2026 — Unreal Engine 5 powering new Mandalorian mission at DHS
